title: Small Artifacts
description: Adds small artifact for player use.
body:
[![Fabric API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jptrzy/small-artifacts-mod/1.18/Images/fabric-api-badge-lanczos.webp)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)
[![Fabric API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jptrzy/small-artifacts-mod/1.18/Images/trinkets-badge-lanczos.webp)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trinkets-fabric)

## About
Small Artifacts Mod adds new useful items for player use.

## Requires:
* [Fabric API](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)
* [Trinkets](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trinkets-fabric)
* [Patchouli](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/patchouli-fabric)

## Artifacts:
* **Gilded Copper Ring** - *protects against piglin anger.*
* **Ender Eye** - *protects against enderman sight.*
* **Scute Cape** - *deflects arrows.*
* **Stray Soul** - *teleport to spawnpoint.*
* **Ender Sack** - *open enderchest.*
* **Copper Altar** - *at first glance it looks like normal furniture, but ...*
